searchPattern.description: Optional search pattern to filter tables. Used in a SQL LIKE clause. Supports wildcards: '%' (match zero or more characters) and '_' (match single character). Examples: '%CLIENTS%' (finds tables with CLIENTS in the name). To search in a specific schema, prepend it: 'SCHEMA_NAME.%'. If omitted, returns all tables for the current connection scheme.

connectionId.description: Optional connection profile ID (e.g., ECUADOR or PANAMA). Normalized to uppercase without diacritics. If omitted, the default profile is used.
